mapper.select: SELECT id, title, summary, summary_ai_generated, content, category, status, cover_image, author_id, author_name, views, likes, created_at, updated_at FROM articles ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, title, summary, summary_ai_generated, content, category, status, cover_image, author_id, author_name, views, likes, created_at, updated_at FROM articles WHERE LOWER(author_name) = LOWER(#{authorName}) ORDER BY created_at DESC
